title: rubus exsul
intro: Rubus exsul, also known as the feral raspberry or wild raspberry, is a type of raspberry plant that grows in the wild and is native to the British Isles. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Rubus exsul include its potential to aid in the treatment of digestive issues, reduce the risk of certain cancers, and support cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
